node.text: @kyotobiketour we would love to go on one of your tours next time in Kyoto! ❤

If Kyoto is on your Japan itinerary 🇯🇵

These are 5 places worth making time for!

Kyoto is one of those cities that feels magical the moment you arrive. We wandered through the thousands of red torii at Fushimi Inari, admired the shimmering Kinkaku-ji, strolled the bamboo paths of Arashiyama, explored historic streets in Gion, and took in the views from Kiyomizu-dera.

If you’re planning a trip to Kyoto or dreaming of your first visit to Japan in 2026, these are spots we genuinely recommend!

Save this Kyoto travel guide for your trip ✈️

Which place would you visit first? Let us know 👇
